name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn, N, it
idle, trying, critical \* are the possible states of a process

(* TypeOK: ensures that state is a function from 1..N to {idle, trying, critical} *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ N > 0
  /\ state \in 1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}
  /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Init: all processes are idle, turn is 1 *)
Init == 
  /\ N \in Nat
  /\ N > 0
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
  /\ turn = 1

(* Next: a process can move from idle to trying, from trying to critical if it's its turn, from critical to idle *)
Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = idle
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = trying
    /\ turn = p
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
    /\ turn' = turn
  \/ \E p \in 1..N :
    /\ state[p] = critical
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
    /\ turn' = (p % N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn, N>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 indicates fork is free *)
       /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next state *)
Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = THINKING
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
       \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if hungry and forks are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = HUNGRY
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
       \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = EATING
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
       \/ (* No state change *)
          /\ states' = states
          /\ forks' = forks

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N]  (* Forks are either 0 or philosopher index *)
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum


define
  maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
  choose(i) == 
    LET maxNum' == maxNum + 1 IN
      LET flag' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN TRUE ELSE flag[j]] IN
        LET num' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN maxNum' ELSE num[j]] IN
          LET flag'' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE flag'[j]] IN
            LET num'' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN maxNum' ELSE num'[j]] IN
              LET flag''' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE flag''[j]] IN
                LET num''' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN maxNum' ELSE num''[j]] IN
                  LET flag'''' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE flag'''[j]] IN
                    LET num'''' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN maxNum' ELSE num'''[j]] IN
                      LET flag''''' == [j \in 1..N |-> IF j = i THEN FALSE ELSE flag''''[j]] IN

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

        /\ writer_active = FALSE

          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks

Init == /\ file \in Seq
        /\ chunkSize \in Nat
        /\ maxRetries \in Nat
        /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
        /\ sentChunks \in Seq
        /\ receivedChunks \in Seq
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = <<>>
        /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next == /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
        /\ IF Len(file) > Len(sentChunks) THEN
              /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(file, Len(sentChunks), Len(sentChunks)+chunkSize))
              /\ retransmitCount' = 0

              /\ IF retransmitCount < maxRetries THEN
                    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

                    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
                    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
           /\ IF Len(receivedChunks) > Len(sentChunks) THEN
                  /\ receivedChunks' = Append(receivedChunks, SubSeq(file, Len(receivedChunks), Len(receivedChunks)+chunkSize))

                  /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunkSize, maxRetries, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>
